framework.name: Semantic Privilege Escalation
framework.description: Agents can chain actions across integrated systems to achieve aggregate privileges no single human would possess. This is the INVERSE of capability attenuation (gap_5) — authority INCREASES across hops rather than diminishing. Directly contradicts any assumption that delegation naturally constrains.
framework.raw_quote: Agents that integrate with multiple systems can chain actions to achieve aggregate privileges no single human user would possess.

source.title: When AI Agents Misbehave: Governance and Security for ... - Our Take
